test_cases.input_summary: Museum location, small crew, half-day access, no broadcaster attached, full details provided
test_cases.notes: Professional tone throughout. Proactively addressed disruption concerns. Clear next step proposed. Correctly used UK letter conventions.

test_cases.input_summary: Hospital location request, sensitive environment, 6-person crew, multi-day access, safeguarding considerations
test_cases.notes: Appropriately acknowledged sensitivity of hospital environment. Flagged that additional documentation (DBS checks, safeguarding protocols) would be needed. Tone respectful without being obsequious.

test_cases.input_summary: Minimal input: private residence, no contact name, no insurance details, no broadcaster
test_cases.notes: Handled missing details gracefully with bracketed placeholders. Tone appropriate for private homeowner approach — less formal than institutional letter. Flagged insurance as something to confirm before sending.
